description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: The player ship must be able to rotate and thrust in any direction for precise control.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Asteroids should split into smaller pieces when hit, increasing the challenge as the game progresses.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should feature a wrap-around screen where objects reappear on the opposite side.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Periodic appearances of a UFO add an extra layer of challenge and scoring opportunities.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Scoring should be based on the size of asteroids destroyed, with larger asteroids yielding more points.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
